heading: Rules and regulations
label: 156 Rules and regulations
text: The Board shall have authority from time to time to make, amend, and rescind, in the manner prescribed by subchapter II of chapter 5 of title 5, such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of this subchapter.
notes: Codification“Subchapter II of chapter 5 of title 5” substituted in text for “the Administrative Procedure Act” on authority of , , , the first section of which enacted Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.Pub. L. 89–554, § 7(b)80 Stat. 631Sept. 6, 1966
Amendments1947—Act , amended section generally to provide that the rules and regulations issued by the Board should be in the manner prescribed by the Administrative Procedure Act.June 23, 1947
Effective Date of 1947 AmendmentFor effective date of amendment by act , see section 104 of act , set out as a note under .June 23, 1947June 23, 1947section 151 of this title
